name: Nevada Title And Payday Loans, Inc.
description_short: Nevada Title and Payday Loans, Inc. offers fast auto title loans, payday loans, and signature installment loans with same-day or next-day funding at their Las Vegas location.
description_long:
Nevada Title and Payday Loans, Inc. operates a physical lending location in downtown Las Vegas at 929 South Las Vegas Blvd, near the Wolfson Medical Center. The company specializes in short-term emergency cash solutions for consumers who need quick access to funds. They position themselves as a fast, accessible alternative for borrowers facing unexpected expenses and time-sensitive financial needs.

The company offers three primary loan products: auto title loans (up to $15,000 based on vehicle value), payday loans for short-term needs between paychecks, and signature installment loans with structured repayment schedules. For title loans, borrowers can keep and drive their vehicle while repaying. The company accepts all credit types and does not require proof of income for title loans—qualification is based primarily on vehicle value and a lien-free title. Loans submitted before 12:00pm EST are typically funded the same business day; after 12:00pm EST funding typically occurs the next business day.

The company distinguishes itself through a hybrid online-to-offline process where customers can start their application online, receive a confirmation call, and then complete the transaction in-store with vehicle inspection for title loans. They emphasize treating customers with courtesy and respect while explaining loan terms and borrowing processes. Staff are described as industry experts who take time to answer borrowing questions. The location is convenient to major landmarks and offers specific hours of operation.

A key caveat is that while emergency cash loans serve legitimate needs, title loans and payday loans typically carry high interest rates and fees that are not disclosed on this website. Borrowers should carefully review all terms, fees, and APRs before committing, as these products are designed for short-term emergency situations, not long-term borrowing. The lack of credit-based qualification standards suggests these loans are high-risk products with pricing to match that risk profile.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Up to $15,000 available in emergency cash based on vehicle value and eligibility
Same-day funding available for loans submitted before 12:00pm EST
No proof of income required for auto title loans—qualification based on vehicle equity
All credit types welcome; no credit denial based on credit history
Borrowers can keep and drive their vehicle while repaying title loans
Hybrid online-to-offline process allows starting application online before in-store completion
Fast in-store processing with friendly, knowledgeable staff trained on loan products
cons: Website does not disclose interest rates, APRs, or fee structures for any loan products
Auto title loans create risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed
Payday loans and title loans are typically high-cost debt products designed only for short-term emergencies, not sustainable borrowing
Limited physical location (single Las Vegas address) restricts accessibility for customers outside the immediate area
No alternative loan options for borrowers who cannot qualify or prefer credit-based lending
best_for: Vehicle owners with lien-free cars facing immediate cash needs and no other credit options
Workers paid by paycheck who need small amounts for emergency expenses between pay periods
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot access traditional personal loans or bank credit
diagnosis: Best for vehicle owners or salaried workers facing immediate cash emergencies who cannot access traditional credit and need funds within 24 hours. Main caveat: these are high-cost debt products designed only for short-term emergency use; borrowers must carefully review all undisclosed fees and APRs before committing, and should avoid using these loans for ongoing expenses or non-emergency purchases.
services: Nevada auto title loans up to $15,000
Las Vegas payday loans for short-term cash needs
Signature installment loans with structured repayment schedules
Same-day and next-day funding based on submission time
In-store vehicle inspection and appraisal for title loans
Vehicle equity assessment and loan amount determination
Loan FAQ resources for title loans, payday loans, and installment loans
In-person loan processing and documentation completion
Phone follow-up after online application submission
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 929 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89101
